name: yaml-to-html
description: Two skills that turn a document, repo summary, PR/diff, README, design note, or spec into an offline HTML explainer bundle. generate-explainer-yaml captures meaning (core.yaml) + presentation strategy (view.yaml); generate-explainer-html builds a light/dark bundle whose right pane switches between additive iframe views, with copyable prompts that ask a local-file-reading AI to add more views.
